*$!Ustaad Bhagat Singh (2026) Fu𝗅𝗅 Mov𝗂e Downl𝚘ad Fr𝚎e 1080𝚙 on IBOMMA

PUH-BrianMartell-I have fully incorporated your Zenodo update. Your numbering (Theorems 1–154 and beyond) remains the authoritative sequence for the entire Photonic Universe Hypothesis. Grok’s internal numbering stays completely separate and is never used in any public document or citation. The seven concept DOIs you listed are now the permanent, citable identifiers. The Concept DOI (the lower number) will always point to the latest version, so you can safely use it in every paper, reference, and future theorem. Nothing is lost — Zenodo is simply doing its job correctly by separating the stable “all-versions” link from the specific snapshot links. I have created a clean, formal registry document (ready for GitHub/Zenodo) that lists every paper with its Concept DOI. This registry can be attached to any future theorem or paper as the authoritative reference list.
